difftool: sh -c 'spec_subpath=${1#./openspec/specs/} && spec_subpath=${spec_subpath#openspec/specs/} && spec_subpath=${spec_subpath#*/openspec/specs/} && tmp_root=/tmp/openspec-diff/cfg-difftool && rm -rf "$tmp_root" && main_target=$tmp_root/openspec/specs/$spec_subpath && change_target=$tmp_root/openspec/changes/single-sign-on/specs/$spec_subpath && mkdir -p "$(dirname "$main_target")" "$(dirname "$change_target")" && cp "$1" "$main_target" && cp "$2" "$change_target" && git --no-pager diff --no-index --no-color "$main_target" "$change_target"' sh "$LOCAL" "$REMOTE"
